args.Description: "Add Göztepe comparison cards to Pre Match"
args.Instruction:
"1. Add GOZTEPE = 'Göztepe Spor Kulübü' (if not already defined) or use it.
2. Calculate metrics for both GOZTEPE and opponent.
3. Update Ofansif tab to include SEPP and Buildup comparisons.
4. Update Defansif tab to include Defensive comparisons."
